category_sources: source_facts.description identifies a spell checker automation tool; official docs describe setup and CI/pre-commit usage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pyspelling; official documentation title uses PySpelling.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation site; the page presents PySpelling setup and usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official PySpelling docs show the pre-commit repo as https://github.com/facelessuser/pyspelling.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a Python CLI spell-checking automation tool; official docs include pre-commit and CI usage.
